name: geoscope-supercolony-agent
description: Multi-channel AI geopolitical analyst with embedding cross-linking. Monitors Telegram channels, finds cross-domain connections via vector similarity, and publishes verified analytical observations to SuperColony.

scripts.generate-wallet: node -e "import('@kynesyslabs/demosdk/websdk').then(({Demos}) => { const d = new Demos(); console.log('New wallet mnemonic:'); console.log(d.newMnemonic(128)); })"
